$comment: Supply-chain allowlist (#67 P0-1a). `.npmrc` sets ignore-scripts=true, so NO dependency runs a
preinstall/install/postinstall by default. Only the packages listed here — reviewed as needing
a genuine, benign install script (native/platform-binary setup) — are re-run by
`npm run allow-scripts` after `npm ci`. Adding an entry is a security decision: verify the
package's install script does only what it claims before listing it. `scripts/allow-scripts.mjs`
fails if any installed dependency has an install script that is NOT listed here (drift gate).
